title: Chocolates Meme Machine
description: A fixed revived version of the previous yet cursed mod.
body:
### About 📖

This mod may seem similar to the previous mod an yes, it is! The reson is that the previous one's workspace got corrupted and so I proceeded to create a new one to support futer updates. If you were looking foward to reciving updates to the precious one then please switch over to this one. But, anyways this mod aims to add blocks items and new types of generation to the game, such as, the Chocolate biome, the Chocolate block, and many other items currently in the game and yet to be added.

### Featured 🎉

If you are new then now is the chance to drop in now more than ever! We have funny addidions blocks and crazy ideas that happen to come to my head! The craziest things can happen when you play this mod so be on the lookout!

### Important 📕

If you want to add this to your modpacks then go ahead! This mod has no dependencies or library mods so you can run this mod standalone.
